bugs.description: Missing category tag on article page
bugs.fix_notes: Added category tag to post.html layout
bugs.root_cause_notes: Jekyll layout validation missing - no check for category tag display
bugs.test_gap_description: No visual validation of article page layout elements
prevention_actions: Added blog_qa_agent.py Jekyll layout validation
Created pre-commit hook for blog structure checks

bugs.description: Charts generated but never embedded in articles
bugs.fix_notes: Enhanced Writer Agent prompt + Publication Validator
bugs.root_cause_notes: Writer Agent prompt didn't explicitly require chart embedding. Graphics Agent created charts but Writer didn't reference them.
bugs.test_gap_description: No test verifying chart markdown exists in article body when chart_data provided
prevention_actions: Enhanced Writer Agent prompt with explicit chart embedding requirements
Added Publication Validator Check #7: Chart Embedding
Added agent_reviewer.py validation for Writer Agent outputs

bugs.description: Duplicate chart display (featured image + embed)
bugs.fix_notes: Removed image: field from front matter
bugs.root_cause_notes: Unclear requirements: featured image vs embedded chart. Jekyll 'image:' field rendered as hero image, causing duplication.
bugs.test_gap_description: No visual regression test for article rendering with charts
prevention_actions: Removed 'image:' field from YAML frontmatter specification
Documented chart embedding pattern: use markdown only, not frontmatter
Updated Writer Agent to use single chart embedding method

bugs.description: GitHub integration broken - issues not auto-closing
bugs.fix_notes: Implemented commit-msg hook to validate GitHub close syntax. Prevents bullet list format that broke auto-close.
bugs.root_cause_notes: GitHub close syntax in bullet list format not recognized. Sprint 4 regression.
bugs.test_gap_description: No test for GitHub webhook integration or commit message validation
prevention_actions: Created .git/hooks/commit-msg to validate GitHub close syntax
Hook blocks commits with invalid format (bullet lists, missing issue numbers)
Sprint 6 Story 1: Final validation and documentation complete

bugs.description: README.md badges show stale values - not updated by build process
bugs.root_cause_notes: calculate_quality_score.py exports badge data but nothing updates README.md. Manual process, prone to drift.
bugs.test_gap_description: No automated test verifying README badges match actual metrics
prevention_actions: Created scripts/update_readme_badges.py for automatic updates
Will add to pre-commit hook for validation
Add CI check to verify badges are current
bugs.fix_notes: Created update_readme_badges.py script, updated README, will integrate into build process

bugs.description: SPRINT.md shows Sprint 2-3 content but Sprint 5 is complete
bugs.root_cause_notes: No automated process to update SPRINT.md from completion reports
bugs.test_gap_description: No validation that SPRINT.md reflects current sprint state

bugs.description: README.md badges show stale data - breaks documentation trust
bugs.root_cause_notes: README badges use hardcoded values instead of dynamic data sources. No validation ensures badges stay current.
bugs.test_gap_description: No automated validation of README badge accuracy. validate_sprint_report.py exists but not enforced.
prevention_actions: Created separate badge generator scripts (generate_sprint_badge.py, generate_tests_badge.py, generate_coverage_badge.py)
Created dedicated validate_badges.py for pre-commit hook
Converted all dynamic badges to shields.io endpoint format with JSON files
Updated pre-commit hook to validate badge accuracy on every commit
bugs.fix_notes: Implemented complete badge automation system per Track 2 Brief: separate generators for each badge type, dedicated validation script, shields.io endpoints for all dynamic badges, pre-commit hook integration

bugs.description: Generated blog posts lack references/citations section
bugs.root_cause_notes: Requirements did not specify that articles must include references/citations section. Research Agent collects sources but requirement for reader-facing references was never documented. This is a specification gap, not an implementation defect - team built to incomplete requirements. LESSON: Quality attributes (references, citations, formatting) must be explicit in story requirements, not discovered post-deployment.
bugs.test_gap_description: No validation that published articles include source attribution or references section
prevention_actions: Add explicit 'References' section requirement to WRITER_AGENT_PROMPT
Add Publication Validator check for references section
Update Blog QA agent to validate source attribution
Create reference formatting template (Economist style)
bugs.reclassification_reason: Requirements did not specify that articles must include references/citations section. Research Agent collects sources but requirement for reader-facing references was never documented. This is a specification gap, not an implementation defect - team built to incomplete requirements. Original Writer Agent story (Sprint 1) specified: Generate Economist-style articles with proper structure, voice, and data integration. References section was not explicitly required or forbidden. This is specification evolution (enhancement request), not implementation failure (bug).

requirements_traceability.requirement_note: Requirements did not specify that articles must include references/citations section. Research Agent collects sources but requirement for reader-facing references was never documented. This is a specification gap, not an implementation defect - team built to incomplete requirements. Original Writer Agent story (Sprint 1) specified: Generate Economist-style articles with proper structure, voice, and data integration. References section was not explicitly required or forbidden. This is specification evolution (enhancement request), not implementation failure (bug).

bugs.description: Pre-commit hooks cause infinite commit loop blocking autonomous git operations
bugs.root_cause_notes: Pre-commit hooks modify files after commit, causing dirty working directory. Agent workflow does not detect and re-stage changes.
bugs.test_gap_description: No integration test for git workflow with pre-commit hooks
prevention_actions: Added post-commit `git status --porcelain` check + `git add -u` + `git commit --amend --no-edit` in both deployment scripts
bugs.fix_notes: Implemented Double Commit Protocol in blog_deployer_server.py and scripts/deploy_to_blog.py: detect post-commit dirty state, re-stage and amend. Idempotent when pre-commit not installed.

bugs.description: B605: Command injection risk in governance.py - shell=True in subprocess call
bugs.root_cause_notes: subprocess.run() called with shell=True at line 212, enabling command injection attacks
bugs.test_gap_description: No security validation tests for subprocess calls
prevention_actions: Add security lint rules to CI/CD (Bandit)
Review all subprocess calls for shell=True
Add pre-commit security scan
bugs.fix_notes: Verified 2026-04-26: scripts/governance.py no longer uses shell=True. subprocess.run uses list form (subprocess.run([editor, temp_path], check=False)). Closing as already-fixed during prior refactor.

bugs.description: B113: requests.get() without timeout in featured_image_agent.py
bugs.root_cause_notes: requests.get() at line 172 missing timeout parameter, could hang indefinitely causing DoS
bugs.test_gap_description: No timeout validation tests for HTTP requests
prevention_actions: Add timeout validation to all requests.get/post calls
Add linting rule for missing timeouts
Review all HTTP client calls
bugs.fix_notes: Verified 2026-04-26: scripts/featured_image_agent.py:249 already uses requests.get(image_data.url, timeout=30). Closing as already-fixed.

bugs.description: Writer Agent YAML frontmatter missing opening '---' delimiter
bugs.root_cause_notes: Writer Agent prompt does not explicitly require opening '---' delimiter in YAML frontmatter. Articles fail publication validation.
bugs.test_gap_description: No test validates YAML frontmatter delimiter presence before publication
prevention_actions: Update Writer Agent prompt to enforce '---' as first line
Add Publication Validator check for YAML delimiter presence
Production validated: Workflow 20719290473 confirmed fix

bugs.description: Writer Agent generates articles 478-543 words (needs 800+ minimum)
bugs.priority_justification: Production blocker - OpenDNS article quarantined, content pipeline halted
bugs.root_cause_notes: Writer Agent prompt lacks explicit 800-word minimum requirement. Articles fail quality standards.
bugs.test_gap_description: No test validates article length before publication
prevention_actions: Single source of truth: 700 minimum across all validators
Added LENGTH as first MANDATORY rule in writer prompt
Documented gate vs target in prompt (gate=700, target=800-1000)
bugs.fix_notes: Aligned word-count gates across codebase to 700 (matches publication_validator.py and skills/economist-writing/SKILL.md sweet-spot floor). Updated agent_reviewer.py, editorial_judge.py, skill_synthesizer.py from 800→700. Strengthened stage3_crew.py writer prompt with explicit LENGTH rule (700-1200 words, target 800-1000) in MANDATORY block.

bugs.description: Publication validator false positive on 'your-content' in filename (from actual title)
bugs.root_cause_notes: Placeholder detection regex too aggressive - flags legitimate title-derived slugs as placeholders
bugs.test_gap_description: No test for placeholder detection with real title slugs
prevention_actions: Enumerated YOUR-* placeholder tokens; no more wildcard match
Added regression test for title-derived slugs (your-content-strategy)
bugs.fix_notes: Replaced overly broad YOUR-\w+ regex in publication_validator.py PLACEHOLDER_TEXT with enumerated tokens (YOUR-NAME, YOUR-COMPANY, YOUR-EMAIL, YOUR-TITLE, YOUR-ROLE, YOUR-DATE, YOUR-COMPANY-NAME) plus word boundaries. Added regression test test_your_in_slug_not_flagged_as_placeholder.

bugs.description: scripts/arxiv_search.py module-level annotation `arxiv.Result` evaluated at class creation, crashes import when optional `arxiv` package missing
bugs.fix_notes: Added `from __future__ import annotations` to defer annotation evaluation until access, allowing the module to import even when the optional dependency is absent.
bugs.root_cause_notes: Type annotation referencing optional dependency at class-body scope, which Python evaluates eagerly without postponed evaluation.
prevention_actions: Pattern: any module with `try: import optional_pkg / except ImportError: optional_pkg = None` must use `from __future__ import annotations` if it references the package in type annotations.

bugs.description: scripts/article_archive.py drops the injected ChromaDB client when CHROMADB_AVAILABLE is False, defeating dependency-injection in tests
bugs.fix_notes: Allow `_client` injection to bypass the availability guard — caller is supplying whatever interface chroma would provide.
bugs.root_cause_notes: Availability guard checked before honouring injection.
prevention_actions: Pattern: dependency-injection points must run before optional-dependency guards.

bugs.description: scripts/quality_dashboard.py reads sprint history from legacy `skills/sprint_history.json` instead of canonical `data/skills_state/sprint_history.json`, rendering dashboards without sprint trends
bugs.fix_notes: Updated path to data/skills_state/. CLAUDE.md is the source of truth for state file locations.
bugs.root_cause_notes: State files were relocated to data/skills_state/ but three readers were missed during the migration.
prevention_actions: Add a regression test asserting the dashboard's sprint-trends section renders with non-empty content when sprint_history.json contains ≥2 sprints.
Grep audit: any future state-file relocation must update all readers in one commit.

bugs.description: scripts/defect_tracker.py reads from legacy `skills/defect_tracker.json` instead of `data/skills_state/defect_tracker.json` — same migration miss as BUG-034
bugs.fix_notes: Path updated to data/skills_state/.
bugs.root_cause_notes: Same migration as BUG-034 — three readers missed when state files moved.
prevention_actions: See BUG-034 — same prevention applies.

bugs.description: scripts/agent_metrics.py reads from legacy `skills/agent_metrics.json` instead of `data/skills_state/agent_metrics.json` — same migration miss as BUG-034/035
bugs.fix_notes: Path updated to data/skills_state/.
bugs.root_cause_notes: Same migration as BUG-034 — three readers missed when state files moved.
prevention_actions: See BUG-034 — same prevention applies.

bugs.description: Stage 3 writer agent produces articles without image_alt or image_caption fields; publication validator now requires both as CRITICAL gates
bugs.root_cause_notes: Output contract for stage3_runner.py was never defined to include image_alt and image_caption. CRITICAL validator gates were added (GH #319) without updating the generator that must satisfy them. Deeper design flaw: the Anthropic Agent SDK migration retained DALL-E for image generation but added no Claude vision step to ground image metadata against the actual visual. The writer agent should emit both fields in its structured output; a Claude vision call should then refine them against the generated image before frontmatter is written.
bugs.test_gap_description: No integration test asserts that stage3_runner output contains image_alt and image_caption fields that satisfy the publication validator contract. unit tests for the validator check the gate logic but not the pipeline's ability to satisfy it end-to-end.
prevention_actions: Add image_alt and image_caption to Stage 3 structured output contract
Wire Claude vision call post-image-generation to ground fields against actual visual
Add integration test: stage3_runner output -> publication_validator passes image metadata gates

findings.writer_output_shape: Writer returns a raw string (not a dataclass). No SpikeResult field changes needed. Fix is: update writer PROMPT at stage3_runner.py lines 253-256 to require image_alt and image_caption as YAML frontmatter fields.
findings.patch_frontmatter_extensible: _patch_frontmatter (flow.py ~line 413) uses regex string injection. Straightforward to extend. Existing tests in TestPatchFrontmatter (test_flow_agent_sdk.py lines 339-357) cover the pattern.
findings.anthropic_mock_pattern: conftest.py has mock_anthropic_client fixture (lines 26-38). Claude vision calls use the same query() async generator path. Mockable via patch of src.agent_sdk.stage3_runner.query.
gaps_identified: _FakePipelineResult (test_flow_agent_sdk.py lines 28-45) has no image_alt or image_caption fields — must be extended.
No test currently validates stage3 output through publication_validator image metadata CRITICAL gates end-to-end.
findings.critical_blocker: Writer prompt (stage3_runner.py lines 253-256) MUST be updated first to require both fields. Vision refinement and frontmatter injection have nothing to refine until the writer emits these fields.

recommended_test_plan.test_vision_refinement: tests/test_flow_agent_sdk.py — new TestVisionRefinement class, patch query()
recommended_test_plan.test_integration: tests/test_flow_agent_sdk.py — extend TestQualityGate: mock pipeline → validator passes image gates
recommended_test_plan.sequence: TDD: RED (write failing tests) → update prompt → GREEN → add vision step → REFACTOR

bugs.fix_notes: Full fix across two commits (f689ea6 + d1ece1f). Writer prompt requires image_alt/image_caption. refine_image_metadata async function in _shared.py grounds fields via Claude vision. 4 MB size guard added. _patch_frontmatter wired in quality_gate call site. All 4 agent-review BLOCKs resolved. 12 tests covering happy path, collision, and 3 fallback branches (no key, missing file, JSON parse failure). 1695 passing, 0 failing.

bugs.description: apply_editorial_fixes mangles Markdown image embeds: the exclamation-strip step turns '![alt](path)' into '.[alt](path)', breaking inline chart/hero embeds. Masked in hero mode by the auto-embed safety net running afterwards.
bugs.root_cause_notes: line.replace('!','.') applied per-line without excluding the Markdown image token '!['.
bugs.fix_notes: Fixed under B-006; verified by Checkpoint B live keyless run passing the publication validator.

bugs.description: run_pipeline chart_only strips the image: frontmatter (and its slug) BEFORE Stage 4, so _auto_embed_chart cannot derive the chart path and the required chart is never embedded -> publication_validator missing_chart. _run_resume already embeds-before-strips; run_pipeline does not.
bugs.root_cause_notes: _strip_image_frontmatter runs before run_stage4/_auto_embed_chart; mirror _run_resume ordering.
bugs.fix_notes: Fixed under B-006; verified by Checkpoint B live keyless run passing the publication validator.

bugs.description: Stage 3 writer sometimes wraps the whole article in a Markdown code fence (```...```). The fence is not stripped, so the article does not start with '---' AND _strip_duplicate_article mistakes the real frontmatter (now at a non-zero offset) for a duplicate emission and deletes the entire body, raising MalformedArticleError (body_empty=True).
bugs.root_cause_notes: raw_writer_output enclosing code fence not stripped before _strip_duplicate_article / frontmatter validation.
bugs.discovered_by: B-006 Checkpoint B live keyless subscription run
bugs.fix_notes: Fixed under B-006; verified by Checkpoint B live keyless run passing the publication validator.

bugs.description: Stage 3 graphics _collect_text call uses the default max_turns=1; against the real subscription CLI the graphics agent needs >1 turn and the SDK raises 'Reached maximum number of turns (1)', which _collect_text does not catch, crashing the whole pipeline. Also: claude_web research MAX_TURNS=12 is too low and soft-degrades to an empty brief on complex topics.
bugs.root_cause_notes: give graphics turn headroom; tolerate turn-cap with partial text; raise claude_web turn cap.
bugs.discovered_by: B-006 Checkpoint B live keyless subscription run (run 2)
bugs.fix_notes: Fixed under B-006; verified by Checkpoint B live keyless run passing the publication validator.

bugs.description: When the graphics model omits the chart 'title' field, render_chart's _validate_spec raises ChartRenderError and crashes the whole pipeline. A missing title is mechanically recoverable and must not abort an otherwise-complete run.
bugs.root_cause_notes: backfill chart title from the article title/topic before render_chart.
bugs.discovered_by: B-006 Checkpoint B live keyless subscription run (run 3)
bugs.fix_notes: Fixed under B-006; verified by Checkpoint B live keyless run passing the publication validator.

bugs.description: Stage 3 (run_stage3) generates the writer draft once and raises MalformedArticleError on any malformed output, aborting the whole run. The writer via the subscription CLI is non-deterministic (empty body, bare code fence), so a single bad draft kills an otherwise-keyless run. run_pipeline has no retry, unlike flow.py's revision loop.
bugs.root_cause_notes: bounded writer regeneration (3 attempts) on malformed output, reusing the research brief.
bugs.discovered_by: B-006 Checkpoint B live keyless subscription run (run 4)
bugs.fix_notes: Fixed under B-006; verified by Checkpoint B live keyless run passing the publication validator.
